title: Microcement - Elite South Texas
content:
Polymer-modified, cementitious flooring are an excellent complement, alternative or cost saving to traditional polished concrete or microcement surfaces, offering enhanced durability, moisture resistance, and aesthetic versatility for both interior and exterior applications. While microcement is valued for its minimalistic, modern appeal, it can be susceptible to staining, and weathering over time. Our systems, when applied as a microcement floor, maintain the seamless, concrete-like look while adding superior performance benefits. These coatings can replicate the smooth, matte or polished finish with added flexibility, making them ideal for decorative floors, walls, patios, and feature spaces in commercial settings.
Advantages
Enhanced Durability
: Outperforms non-polymer modified microcement in abrasion, cracking, and impact resistance.
Seamless, Modern Aesthetic
: Maintains the clean, minimal look of polished concrete floors.
Moisture & Stain Resistance
: Ideal for most damp environments.
UV Stability Options
: Prevents discoloration or degradation in exterior or sun-exposed areas.
Custom Finishes & Colors
: Available in matte, satin, or gloss with a range of decorative effects.
Flexible & Crack-Resistant
: Adapts better to substrate movement without surface damage.
Interior & Exterior Compatibility
: One system for continuous flow from indoor to outdoor spaces.
Low Maintenance
: Easier to clean and less prone to staining or sealing compared to microcement.
